title: cheilanthes humilis
intro: Cheilanthes humilis, also known as Rock Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Pteridaceae family, characterized by its small, delicate fronds and ability to thrive in rocky, dry environments. Traditionally, Cheilanthes humilis has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting tissue repair, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity, which can help prevent infections and promote healing. Cheilanthes humilis can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
